summary: Iteration 125: Verified download.js migration to downloadFile() utility and WhatsApp internal PDF generation. All 14 core backend tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with export buttons.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Login flow works (username: admin, password: admin123)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf, PDF magic bytes %PDF)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf?party_name=test returns valid PDF
VERIFIED: POST /api/whatsapp/send-party-ledger generates PDF internally via _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes()
VERIFIED: GET /api/whatsapp/settings returns api_key_masked field
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/excel returns valid Excel (PK zip header)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/outstanding/pdf returns valid PDF
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/outstanding/excel returns valid Excel
VERIFIED: GET /api/cash-book/excel returns valid Excel
VERIFIED: download.js correctly implements downloadFile() for GET and downloadPost() for POST
VERIFIED: Electron detection via window.electronAPI or window.ELECTRON_API_URL
VERIFIED: Browser fallback uses blob + anchor tag download approach
VERIFIED: CashBook page loads with sub-tabs (Cash Transactions, Party Ledgers, Party Summary, GST Ledger)
VERIFIED: DC Tracker page loads with sub-tabs (DC/Delivery Challan, MSP Payments) and Excel/PDF buttons
VERIFIED: Milling Tracker page loads with sub-tabs (Milling Entries, Paddy Custody Register) and Excel/PDF buttons
VERIFIED: Reports page loads with sub-tabs (CMR vs DC, Season P&L, Daily Report, Agent & Mandi) and Excel/PDF buttons
VERIFIED: SaleBook page loads with sub-tabs (Sale Vouchers, Purchase Vouchers, Paddy Purchase, Stock Summary, Party Summary) and PDF/Excel buttons
VERIFIED: Settings page loads with 5 sub-tabs (Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data)
VERIFIED: Entries page loads with Excel/PDF export buttons
VERIFIED: Dashboard & Targets page loads with PDF Export and Summary Report buttons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI pages verified with export buttons)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 125 verified: 1) All inline blob downloads migrated to centralized downloadFile() utility in /app/frontend/src/utils/download.js, 2) WhatsApp Party Ledger PDF generated internally via shared _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes() function, 3) All pages load correctly with export buttons. App version is v53.7.0. Dark theme with Hindi language support.

login_flow.details: Login with admin/admin123 works, What's New dialog shows v53.7.0 release notes

party_ledger_pdf.details: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF with correct Content-Type and magic bytes

whatsapp_send_party_ledger.details: POST /api/whatsapp/send-party-ledger generates PDF internally (no HTTP self-call)

outstanding_report_exports.details: Both PDF and Excel exports work

cashbook_page.details: CashBook page loads with sub-tabs: Cash Transactions, Party Ledgers, Party Summary, GST Ledger

dc_tracker_page.details: DC Tracker page loads with sub-tabs: DC/Delivery Challan, MSP Payments with Excel/PDF buttons

milling_tracker_page.details: Milling Tracker page loads with sub-tabs: Milling Entries, Paddy Custody Register with Excel/PDF buttons

reports_page.details: Reports page loads with sub-tabs: CMR vs DC, Season P&L, Daily Report, Agent & Mandi with Excel/PDF buttons

salebook_page.details: SaleBook page loads with sub-tabs: Sale Vouchers, Purchase Vouchers, Paddy Purchase, Stock Summary, Party Summary with PDF/Excel buttons

settings_page.details: Settings page loads with 5 sub-tabs: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data

entries_page.details: Entries page loads with Excel/PDF export buttons

dashboard_page.details: Dashboard & Targets page loads with PDF Export and Summary Report buttons

download_utility_verification.downloadFile_function: Uses window.open for Electron, blob+anchor for browser
download_utility_verification.downloadPost_function: Uses IPC saveFile for Electron, blob+anchor for browser

whatsapp_internal_pdf_verification.change: Calls _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes() directly instead of HTTP self-call
